## Imperfect Human Feedback: Inconsistency

{{< include slides/inconsistency/preamble.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/inconsistency/time.qmd >}}

[@inconsistent]{style="font-size: 0.8em;"}.

## Imperfect Human Feedback: Inconsistency

{{< include slides/inconsistency/preamble.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/inconsistency/false-beliefs.qmd >}}

[@inconsistent]{style="font-size: 0.8em;"}.

<!-- This enables their model to *explain* observed behavior as a function of its parameters. -->
